response:
HELLO THERE FRIENDS WHO READ THIS NOTE NOW.
ANGEL SENT MANY LETTERS TO PEN PALS FAR AWAY.
SHE USED BIG ENVELOPES FOR MOST OF HER WRITING.
TWENTY SMALL ONES HELD THE REST OF HER WORDS.
EACH LARGE PACKAGE CONTAINS TWO PAGES OF TEXT.
TOTAL COUNT OF LETTERS REACHES EIGHTY IN ALL.
SIXTY REMAINING ITEMS FIT INSIDE THOSE BIG ONES.
THIRTY LARGE ENVELOPES WERE NEEDED TO HOLD THEM.
MATH PROBLEM SOLVED WITH CARE AND QUICK LOGIC.
COUNTING UP THE NUMBERS IS FUN AND EASY TOO.
EVERY SINGLE WORD HERE STAYS UNIQUE AND NEW.
NO REPEATS ALLOWED IN THIS WHOLE SHORT STORY.
PLEASE READ ON AND SEE THE FINAL ANSWER NOW.
THIRTY IS THE NUMBER WE FOUND FOR HER USE.
BIG BOXES HELD THE MAIL WITH TWO EACH TIME.
SMALL ONES TOOK THE LAST TWENTY LEFT OVER.
TOTALS MATCH PERFECTLY WHEN YOU DO THE SUM.
LOGIC WORKS WELL WHEN YOU THINK ABOUT IT.
ANSWER IS CLEAR FOR ANYONE WHO LOOKS CLOSE.
HERE COMES THE END OF THIS BRIEF TALE.
GOODBYE NOW AND HAVE A VERY NICE DAY.
